title: Let the King of Glory In

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: From distant stars to ocean deep
Every treasure Earth may keep
Mountains high and valleys low
All belong to God, we know
Every heartbeat, every soul
Under heaven's great control

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Who can climb the holy hill?
Whose heart is pure, whose hands are clean?
Let the King of Glory in
Ancient gates, rise up and sing
(Let the King of Glory in)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Truth-seekers walking in the light
Hearts transparent in His sight
Blessed are those who seek His face
Standing firm in holy space
Justice flows from heaven's throne
Mercy makes His presence known

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Who can climb the holy hill?
Whose heart is pure, whose hands are clean?
Let the King of Glory in
Ancient gates, rise up and sing
(Let the King of Glory in)

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Who is this King of Glory bright?
Lord of hosts and endless might
Standing at the gates of time
Calling all of humankind

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Who can climb the holy hill?
Whose heart is pure, whose hands are clean?
Let the King of Glory in
Ancient gates, rise up and sing
(All belongs to Him)

epigraph: and the King of glory shall come in
